final.final_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM stadium s
WHERE s.Stadium_ID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.Stadium_ID
    FROM concert c
    WHERE c.Year = '2014'
);
final.answer_text: The names of stadiums that did not host a concert in 2014 are: Bayview Stadium, Hampden Park, Forthbank Stadium, Gayfield Park, Recreation Park, and Tynecastle Stadium.
